zh.Nynehead, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特尼內黑阿德
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wake於1368年出生在英國戴文奧可哈普頓時，他的父親Roger Wykes33歲，母親Ana Cooke29歲。他於大約1398年與Katherine Burnell在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1423年在英國薩默塞特尼內黑阿德享年56歲。

zh-hans.Nynehead, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特尼內黑阿德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wake于1368年出生在英国戴文奧可哈普頓时，他的父亲Roger Wykes33岁，母亲Ana Cooke29岁。他于大约1398年与Katherine Burnell在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1423年在英国薩默塞特尼內黑阿德享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for ‘(man of) the watch’, from Middle English wak, wake ‘wake, vigil, watch, period of guard duty’ (Old English wacu, Old Norse vaka). It alternates with the synonymous Middle English wache (Old English wacce), hence the variant Watch. The surname was also interchangeable with Waite (the equivalent Old French term) which, like Wake, was sometimes translated as Latin vigil ‘(one who is) watchful, alert’. Compare the synonymous Vail . When the bearers had high social status, the surname probably denoted an officer with responsibility for the security of a castle, town, or royal person. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Vail
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French de la veille ‘of the watch, watchman’, with loss of de; compare Wake . There has been some confusion with the topographic name Vale and the nickname Veal .
Scottish: shortened and altered form of McPhail , Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phàil ‘son of Paul’.

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wake was born in 1368, in Okehampton, Devon, England, his father, Roger Wykes, was 33 and his mother, Ana Cooke, was 29. He married Katherine Burnell about 1398, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died about 1423, in Nynehead, Somerset, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wake est né en 1368, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Roger Wykes, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ana Cooke, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Burnell environ 1398, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé environ 1423, à Nynehead, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Wake 1368 in Okehampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Wykes 33 und seine Mutter Ana Cooke 29. Er hat um 1398 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Katherine Burnell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb um 1423 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Nynehead, Somerset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Wake è nato il nel 1368 nel Okehampton, Devon, England, il suo padre, Roger Wykes, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Ana Cooke, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Burnell circa 1398, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì circa 1423, nel Nynehead, Somerset, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: William Wake(이)가 1368년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Wykes(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ana Cooke(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Katherine Burnell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1423년 영국 서머세트 니니헤드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Wake nasceu em 1368, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Wykes, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ana Cooke, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Burnell aproximadamente 1398, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1423, em Nynehead, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wake родился в 1368 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Wykes было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ana Cooke, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Burnell около 1398 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер около 1423 г. в местности нинэид, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Wake nació en 1368, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Wykes, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Ana Cooke, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Katherine Burnell aproximadamente 1398, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1423, en Nynehead, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
